title: anisantha rubens subsp. kunkelii
intro: Anisantha rubens subsp. kunkelii, also known as Kunkel's Broom Grass or Anisantha kunkelii, is a subspecies of the Anisantha rubens plant, a perennial grass native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anisantha rubens subsp. kunkelii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
